query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, lu.id as lineUserId, lu.lineUserId as lineUserIdValue FROM users u LEFT JOIN line_users lu ON u.id = lu.userId ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 10;

logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 1: Unknown column 'lu.userid' in 'on clause'
